meaning: n.象形文字,象形文字写成的文章
examples: It contains the same exact text written in three different alphabets: Greek, demotic, hieroglyphic.
Two of the three alphabets are ancient Egyptian scripts that stop being used: the hieroglyphic and the demotic.
The Rosetta Stone was remarkable because, as I said, on it was the same text in three different alphabets: Greek, demotic and hieroglyphic.
Drag and drop up to three images to make a hieroglyphic sentence of a thought.
Aboriginal art's origins lie in a pre-hieroglyphic age, a time when there was no written language.
